nav garbage

Security at HackerOne

Thanks for your interest in our bug bounty program.

In Scope

  • *.hackerone.com
  • api.hackerone.com
  • hackerone-user-content.com
Out of Scope
  • Social engineering attacks against HackerOne employees
  • Physical attacks against our offices
  • Denial of Service (DoS/DDoS) attacks
  • Known issues listed in this policy
  • Attacks requiring access to a HackerOne admin account
Known Issues
  • Missing HTTP security headers on marketing pages
  • HSTS not set on hackerone-user-content.com

Program Rules

Please follow responsible disclosure. Do not access or modify user data without explicit consent. Provide a clear PoC including request, response, and reproduction steps. Submissions missing a working PoC will be closed as Not Applicable.

Severity and Rewards

  • Critical: $10,000
  • High: $5,000
  • Medium: $1,500
  • Low: $500
footer garbage
